articles.title: OpenAI Launches GPT-5 with Native Multimodal Reasoning and Extended Agent Capabilities
articles.summary: OpenAI officially released GPT-5, featuring deeply integrated multimodal reasoning across text, image, audio, and video inputs with significantly improved chain-of-thought performance. The model introduces persistent agent memory and the ability to execute multi-step tool-use workflows autonomously, marking a shift from conversational AI to agentic AI as the primary product paradigm.

articles.title: Google DeepMind's Gemini Robotics Models Enable Zero-Shot Dexterous Manipulation
articles.summary: DeepMind published results from its Gemini Robotics program demonstrating foundation models that allow robotic hands to perform complex dexterous manipulation tasks—such as assembling small electronic components—without task-specific fine-tuning. The system leverages a vision-language-action architecture trained on massive simulation and real-world teleoperation datasets, achieving a 87% success rate on previously unseen objects.

articles.title: Figure AI and BMW Expand Humanoid Deployment to Full Assembly Line Integration
articles.summary: Figure AI announced it has scaled its humanoid robot deployment at BMW's Spartanburg plant from a pilot of 50 units to over 300, now covering multiple stages of vehicle sub-assembly. The robots operate alongside human workers using real-time LLM-driven task planning, reportedly reducing line downtime by 18% and marking the largest commercial humanoid deployment in manufacturing to date.

articles.title: Anthropic Introduces Constitutional Classifiers for Enterprise AI Safety Guardrails
articles.summary: Anthropic released a new suite of constitutional classifiers designed to let enterprises define and enforce custom safety and compliance policies for Claude deployments without sacrificing model capability. The approach uses lightweight classifier heads trained via constitutional AI methods, enabling fine-grained control over outputs in regulated industries like healthcare and finance with sub-5ms latency overhead.

articles.title: TSMC Begins Volume Production of 1.4nm GAA Process Node Ahead of Schedule
articles.summary: TSMC confirmed it has commenced high-volume production on its N1.4 gate-all-around (GAA) transistor process, approximately one quarter ahead of its original roadmap. The node delivers a 20% power efficiency gain over N2 and is expected to power next-generation AI accelerators and mobile SoCs shipping in late 2026, intensifying the competition with Samsung Foundry and Intel.

articles.title: Meta Releases Llama 4 Behemoth as Open-Weight Model with MoE Architecture
articles.summary: Meta released Llama 4 Behemoth, a massive mixture-of-experts model with over 2 trillion total parameters and 288 billion active parameters per forward pass, under its open-weight license. Benchmarks show it competitive with GPT-5 and Gemini Ultra on reasoning and coding tasks, and the open release has reignited debate about the safety implications of making frontier-class models widely available.

articles.title: Neuralink Receives FDA Clearance for Second-Generation Brain-Computer Interface Implant
articles.summary: Neuralink obtained FDA clearance for its N2 implant, a second-generation BCI device featuring 4,096 electrodes—quadruple the original—and wireless charging capability. The approval covers expanded clinical trials for patients with quadriplegia and ALS, with early trial participants demonstrating cursor control speeds approaching those of able-bodied users with a traditional mouse.

articles.title: Boston Dynamics Atlas Achieves Autonomous Disaster Site Navigation in DARPA Evaluation
articles.summary: Boston Dynamics' electric Atlas humanoid completed a DARPA-supervised evaluation in which it autonomously navigated a simulated collapsed building, identified hazards, and performed basic search tasks without human teleoperation. The robot used onboard LiDAR-vision fusion and a locally-running planning model to traverse unstructured rubble terrain, representing a major milestone for autonomous humanoid robots in emergency response scenarios.
